content_html:
The Talk Show Live From WWDC 2026

The annual live audience episode of The Talk Show during the week of WWDC. John Gruber will be joined by one or more special guests. Doors open at 6 pm. Show starts at 7 pm.

Tickets Prices in USD

Additional Information

A full assortment of beverages, including top-shelf liquor and quality beer, will be available. Attendees who wish to partake in such should bring ID.

Attendees who wish to partake in such should bring ID.
summary: Location: The California Theatre, San Jose Showtime: Tuesday, 9 June 2026, 7pm PT (Doors open 6pm) Special Guest(s): For sure Price: $45 The annual live audience episode of The Talk Show during the week of WWDC. If you can make it, you should come. You’ll even enjoy the prelude, mingling with fellow DF readers and listeners. Also: at least one sponsorship s…
title: The Talk Show Live From WWDC 2026: Tuesday June 9
